replies_today.reply: The claim is supported. Multiple news outlets confirm Shakira announced "Dai Dai" featuring Burna Boy as the official FIFA World Cup 2026 song, coming May 14th, from Maracanã Stadium.

"Handcuffed a baby" is unverified. While no credible reports exist of literal handcuffing, incidents of police acting inappropriately towards children have occurred. Public trust erodes when power oversteps.
Unverified (60% confidence). Some anecdotal reports support this. But generally, master's degrees boost prospects & earnings. Context matters.
